title: clinopodium umbrosum var. japonicum
intro: Clinopodium umbrosum var. japonicum, also known as Japanese Clinopodium, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Japanese Clinopodium include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Japanese Clinopodium can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal benefits, and it is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
